name: General Purpose Acquisition Corp.
business: General Purpose Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company incorporated to effect a business combination with one or more businesses. It has not yet completed any business combination and has no operating revenues. It intends to focus on businesses in maritime, logistics, and digital infrastructure sectors.

exposures.sentence: Data centers are foundational to the digital economy, particularly as demand for artificial intelligence workloads accelerates.

We intend to target data center platforms with scalable infrastructure, strong tenant relationships, and the ability to support next-generation compute environments in a rapidly evolving digital landscape.

This sector integrates advanced software platforms, data analytics, automation, and artificial intelligence to optimize vessel operations, enhance safety protocols, ensure regulatory compliance, and promote environmental sustainability.
Marine logistics encompasses the transportation, warehousing, and coordination of goods between vessels, ports, and inland logistics providers.

U.S.-flag fleets engaged in international trade and government contracting (e.g., Military Sealift Command and Maritime Security Program) also benefit from regulatory support and long-term charter opportunities.
